verdict.description: approve = changes are sound; request_changes = at least one real issue worth fixing.

summary.description: One or two sentences on the overall assessment of the changed files.

findings.description: Specific issues. Empty when verdict is approve.

file.description: Path of the file the finding applies to.

line.description: 1-based line number, or null if not line-specific.

severity.description: blocker = security/breakage; major = real bug or violation of project rules; minor = should fix; nit = optional polish.

confidence.description: How certain you are this is a real issue (5 = certain).

message.description: What the issue is and why it matters.

suggestion.description: Concrete fix, or null if none.
